scripts.build:app: corepack pnpm -s prepare:resources && corepack pnpm --filter @tuanchat/web run build && corepack pnpm -s sync:web-build && corepack pnpm -s compile
scripts.build: corepack pnpm -s build:app && corepack pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json
scripts.build:win:zip: corepack pnpm -s build:app && corepack pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --win zip
scripts.build:win:nsis: corepack pnpm -s build:app && corepack pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --win nsis
scripts.build:mac:zip: corepack pnpm -s build:app && corepack pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --mac zip
scripts.build:mac:dmg: corepack pnpm -s build:app && corepack pnpm exec electron-builder build --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg
